Package org.mitre.synthea.world.agents

Class Provider

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.world.agents.Provider
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, QuadTreeElement
public class Provider extends Object implements QuadTreeElement, Serializable
Represents a healthcare provider.
See Also:
  • Serialized Form

      Ownership type of the provider.

      public boolean institutional
      institutional (e.g. hospital) else professional (e.g. PCP)

    • Provider

      public Provider()
      Create a new Provider with no information.

  • Method Details

    • getResourceID

      public String getResourceID()
      Returns the unique resource ID of the provider.
      Returns:
      The resource ID.

    • getResourceLocationID

      public String getResourceLocationID()
      Returns the unique resource location ID of the provider.
      Returns:
      The resource location ID.

    • getAttributes

      public Map<String,Object> getAttributes()
      Returns the attributes of the provider.
      Returns:
      A map of attributes.

    • hasService

      public boolean hasService(HealthRecord.EncounterType service)
      Checks if the provider offers a specific service.
      Parameters:
      service - The service to check.
      Returns:
      True if the service is offered, false otherwise.

    • incrementEncounters

      public void incrementEncounters(HealthRecord.EncounterType service, int year)
      Increments the number of encounters for a specific service and year.
      Parameters:
      service - The service type.
      year - The year of the encounter.

    • incrementProcedures

      public void incrementProcedures(int year)
      Increments the number of procedures for a specific year.
      Parameters:
      year - The year of the procedures.

    • incrementLabs

      public void incrementLabs(int year)
      Increments the number of labs for a specific year.
      Parameters:
      year - The year of the labs.

    • incrementPrescriptions

      public void incrementPrescriptions(int year)
      Increments the number of prescriptions for a specific year.
      Parameters:
      year - The year of the prescriptions.

    • getUtilization

      public com.google.common.collect.Table<Integer,String,AtomicInteger> getUtilization()
      Returns the utilization statistics for the provider.
      Returns:
      A table of utilization statistics.

    • getBedCount

      public Integer getBedCount()
      Get the bed count for this Provider facility.
      Returns:
      The number of beds, if they exist, otherwise null.

    • accepts

      public boolean accepts(Person person, long time)
      Will this provider accept the given person as a patient at the given time?.
      Parameters:
      person - Person to consider
      time - Time the person seeks care
      Returns:
      whether or not the person can receive care by this provider

    • addRevenue

      public void addRevenue(double costOfCare)
      Adds the given amount to the provider's total revenue.
      Parameters:
      costOfCare - the cost of the care to be added to revenue.

    • getRevenue

      public double getRevenue()
      Returns the total revenue of this provider.
      Returns:
      the total revenue.

    • findService

      public static Provider findService(Person person, HealthRecord.EncounterType service, long time)
      Find specific service provider for the given person.
      Parameters:
      person - The patient who requires the service.
      service - The service required. For example, EncounterType.AMBULATORY.
      time - The date/time within the simulated world, in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      Service provider or null if none is available.

    • findServiceNewProvider

      public static Provider findServiceNewProvider(Person person, HealthRecord.EncounterType service, long time, List<String> takenIds)
      Find a provider that does not already have a health record for the given person.
      Parameters:
      person - The patient who requires the service.
      service - The service required. For example, EncounterType.AMBULATORY.
      time - The date/time within the simulated world, in milliseconds.
      takenIds - List of provider UUIDs that are already taken.
      Returns:
      Service provider or null if none is available.

    • clear

      public static void clear()
      Clear the list of loaded and cached providers.

    • loadProviders

      public static void loadProviders(Location location, DefaultRandomNumberGenerator random)
      Load into cache the list of providers for a state.
      Parameters:
      location - the state being loaded.
      random - Source of randomness for provider generation.

    • loadProviders

      public static void loadProviders(Location location, String filename, Provider.ProviderType providerType, Set<HealthRecord.EncounterType> servicesProvided, RandomNumberGenerator random, boolean optional) throws IOException
      Read the providers from the given resource file, only importing the ones for the given state. THIS method is for loading providers and generating clinicians with specific specialties
      Parameters:
      location - the state being loaded
      filename - Location of the file
      providerType - ProviderType
      servicesProvided - Set of services provided by these facilities
      random - Source of randomness for provider generation
      optional - if true the function will silently ignore a null or empty filename
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file cannot be read

    • chooseClinicianList

      public Clinician chooseClinicianList(String specialty, RandomNumberGenerator rand)
      Randomly chooses a clinician out of a given clinician list.
      Parameters:
      specialty - - the specialty to choose from.
      rand - - random number generator.
      Returns:
      A clinician with the required specialty.

    • getLonLat

      public Point2D.Double getLonLat()
      Returns the geographic coordinates of the provider.
      Returns:
      the geographic coordinates.

    • getProviderList

      public static List<Provider> getProviderList()
      Returns the list of all providers.
      Returns:
      the list of providers.

    • getX

      public double getX()
      Description copied from interface: QuadTreeElement
      Get the x-coordinate of this element.
      Specified by:
      getX in interface QuadTreeElement
      Returns:
      the x-coordinate

    • getY

      public double getY()
      Description copied from interface: QuadTreeElement
      Get the y-coordinate of this element.
      Specified by:
      getY in interface QuadTreeElement
